title: Accept a payment with PaymentElement
description: Learn how to accept a one-time payment by embedding the PaymentElement into your own UI.

steps.title: Accept a one-time payment
steps.description: Create a PaymentIntent on your server, mount PaymentElement in your client, and confirm the payment.

nodes.title: Create a PaymentIntent
nodes.description: On your server, create a PaymentIntent with the amount and currency. Return the client_secret to your client to initialize the PaymentElement.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Initialize and mount PaymentElement
nodes.description: On your client, initialize Stripe.js with the client_secret from the PaymentIntent, mount the PaymentElement, and call stripe.confirmPayment() to complete the payment.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Handle payment_intent.succeeded
nodes.description: Listen for the payment_intent.succeeded webhook event to confirm the payment was successful and fulfill the order.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.
